hints.text: US overseas territory east of Fiji — **counts as US** in country streaks
Green **tropical mountains + palms**; small roads often **concrete**; one-storey boxy houses w/ plain **metal-sheet roofs**

**Island = truck**: Tutuila (main island, most coverage) = slightly rusted **black truck bed**; Manu'a & Olosega = **silver-grey truck front** w/ mirrors; Ta'ū (easternmost) = **glossy black truck** w/ mirrors

**Spotlights**: single-lane **bridge Manu'a↔Olosega** w/ thin wire guardrail + both islands visible; **Ofu Airport** = small concrete runway, car w/ **two orange roof straps**, palms beyond the runway
